name: Shisky (Doughnuts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Scald the milk and let it cool to lukewarm.
2. Add the yeast to the cooled milk.
3. Cream the butter or margarine with sugar until smooth.
4. Add the beaten eggs to the butter mixture, mixing well.
5. Alternately add flour and milk to the butter mixture until all are incorporated.
6. Knead the dough in a bowl until it is no longer sticky to the hands.
7. Let the dough rise for 2 or 3 hours until doubled in size.
8. Roll out the dough on a floured board to a thickness of about half an inch.
9. Cut the rolled-out dough into desired shapes using a floured glass.
10. Fry the doughnut pieces in deep fat until lightly browned.
11. Cool and sprinkle with powdered sugar or fill with jelly or lekvar.
